zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Neville於1439年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓時，她的父親Thomas de Neville34歲，母親Elizabeth Babington45歲。她於1452年與Ralph Marshall在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾德林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年2月25日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾潘頓享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Neville于1439年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓时，她的父亲Thomas de Neville34岁，母亲Elizabeth Babington45岁。她于1452年与Ralph Marshall在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾德林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1504年2月25日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾潘頓享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Neville was born in 1439, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Neville, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Babington, was 45. She married Ralph Marshall in 1452, in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 February 1504, in Panton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Neville est née en 1439, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Neville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Babington, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Marshall en 1452, à Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 février 1504, à Panton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Neville 1439 in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Neville 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Babington 45. Sie hat 1452 in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Februar 1504 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Panton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Neville è nata il nel 1439 nel Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Neville, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Babington, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Marshall nel 1452, nel Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 febbraio 1504, nel Panton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Nevilleが1439年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Nevilleは34歳，母Elizabeth Babingtonは45歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアジェドリングでRalph Marshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年2月25日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアプアントンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Neville(이)가 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Neville(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Babington(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 게들링에서 Ralph Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Neville nasceu em 1439, em Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Neville, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Babington, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Marshall em 1452, em Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1504, em Panton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Neville родилась в 1439 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Neville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Babington, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Marshall в 1452 г. в местности джедлинг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 февраля 1504 г. в местности пантон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Neville nació en 1439, en Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Neville, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Babington, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Ralph Marshall en 1452, en Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1504, en Panton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
